name: 道の駅 霧島
desc: 霧島神宮から車で5分、霧島連山と錦江湾・桜島を望む道の駅。神話の里公園には遊覧リフトやスーパースライダーがあり、霧島黒豚しゃぶしゃぶが名物。
descEn: Five minutes by car from Kirishima Shrine, with views of the Kirishima mountains, Kinko Bay, and Sakurajima. Shinwa no Sato Park has a scenic chairlift and super slide, and Kirishima black pork shabu-shabu is a signature dish.
